label: Knowledge editing & memory consolidation

node.label: Knowledge editing & memory consolidation
node.definition: Knowledge editing changes selected factual or behavioral associations in parameters or external memory while attempting to preserve unrelated capabilities.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Knowledge editing & memory consolidation is to connect Parametric memory, Continual learning & test-time adaptation pipelines to downstream capabilities including Memory lifecycle, forgetting & consolidation.
examples: substrate for Memory lifecycle, forgetting & consolidation
limitations: Stored or retrieved information can be stale, private, contradictory, inaccessible, or incorrectly ranked at the moment it is needed. Its direct dependencies include Parametric memory, Continual learning & test-time adaptation pipelines.

dependencies.rationale: Knowledge editing & memory consolidation stores, selects, or obtains information through Parametric memory.
Knowledge editing & memory consolidation uses Continual learning & test-time adaptation pipelines as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Knowledge editing & memory consolidation uses Causal inference as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
